name: git-commit
description: Stage files and commit in one step, auto-configuring git identity if missing.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more file paths to stage before the message; defaults to -A (all changes)

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses the three-step git add + identity config (if missing) + git commit pattern into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per commit.
